steps.title: Identify the genetic redistribution
steps.content: The key clue is the gene expression pattern: anterior genes active throughout the entire body, posterior genes limited to the edges.

steps.title: Interpret the genetic shift
steps.content: The anterior region expands throughout the body while posterior shrank to the margins—sea stars evolved to expand the head and eliminate the trunk, inverting the traditional head-loss assumption. The other choices misread the genetic distribution, deny the bilateral ancestor relationship, or falsely claim genetic correspondence doesn't exist. That matches choice D — D is correct.
